sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا تَطْبُخُ الأُمُّ كَثِيرًا، تُرْسِلُ لِلجِيرَانِ.
sentences.translation: Kada majka skuha puno, šalje komšijama.
sentences.translationEn: When the mother cooks a lot, she sends to the neighbors.
Sharing food is a generous habit.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ الجَارُ بِالسَّعَادَةِ عِنْدَمَا يَصِلُهُ الطَّعَامُ.
sentences.translation: Komšija se osjeća sretno kada dobije hranu.
sentences.translationEn: The neighbor feels happy when the food arrives.

sentences.translation: Tako se jačaju odnosi između ljudi.
sentences.translationEn: This is how relationships between people are strengthened.

sentences.arabic: الكَرَمُ صِفَةٌ مَحْمُودَةٌ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Darežljivost je pohvaljena osobina u arapskoj kulturi.
sentences.translationEn: Generosity is a praised quality in Arab culture.
